title: Stupendous Visuals X Fresh Animations Compat
description: Compatibility for Stupendous Visuals and Fresh Animations
body:
This pack adds compatibility for the Stupendous Visuals resource pack with the fresh animations pack. Currently a work in progress but features the most important mobs

![image of sheep](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07656af45e978487d7a081484bf7b6804871403c.png)

This requires both the original Stupendous Visuals and Fresh animations pack.

**Stupendous Visuals**: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stupendous-visual

**Fresh Animations**: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations
